channel.title: Libp2p on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Libp2p on Arrans github.io

item.title: mudler/LocalAI
item.description: LocalAI is the open-source AI engine. Run any model - LLMs, vision, voice, image, video - on any hardware. No GPU required.

item.title: berty/berty
item.description: Berty is a secure peer-to-peer messaging app that works with or without internet access, cellular data or trust in the network
